title: 祖玛少女/Zuma Girls
description:
New Game Coming Soon

Об игреZuma girl is a casual marble shooting game, which integrates RPG skills and strategies with traditional Zuma playing methods.

You will meet three beautiful girls in the battle. Who is stronger or weaker? Only the brave survive to the end!

◆ interesting gameplay content, integrating RPG element gameplay on traditional Zuma. 

◆ rich level content, up to 9 levels, each level will be different. 

◆ there are more than 10 original beautiful music. 

◆ exquisite original paintings of art people, an extraordinary visual feast.
description_short: Zuma girl is a casual marble shooting game, which integrates RPG skills and strategies with traditional Zuma playing methods. You will meet three beautiful girls in the battle. Who is stronger or weaker? Only the brave survive to the end!
